description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped rock with a rugged and angular profile. Its surface displays a mix of dark gray, bluish-gray, and off-white tones, with some areas appearing rougher and more weathered than others. The rock has a natural, unpolished texture, with visible granular and crystalline inclusions, suggesting it is composed primarily of stone or mineral material. One side of the rock is notably lighter, with a chalky or dusty appearance, while the other sides are darker and more solid in color. The overall form is asymmetrical, with no flat surfaces, making it difficult to balance objects on top. This rock would be commonly found as a natural obstacle or landscaping element in urban parks, roadside verges, or garden settings.
description: A rugged, irregularly shaped rock with dark gray, bluish, and off-white tones and a rough, natural texture. Its asymmetrical form and granular surface suggest it is a solid stone, suitable as an urban obstacle or landscaping feature.
description_view_0: This view shows the rock's dark, solid side with a slightly sloped top and rough, uneven surface.
description_view_1: Here, the rock appears more angular and elongated, with a prominent bluish-gray face and sharper edges.
description_view_2: This side reveals a lighter, off-white area with a chalky texture, contrasting with the darker upper portion.
description_view_3: The rock is seen edge-on, highlighting its narrow profile and the transition between dark and light surfaces.
